9539.description_en: A box containing 10 blue potions [event-specific]. \nSuper suitable for use when needed.

10001.description_en: A helmet made from the skull of an animal.

10002.description_en: Masks that can also be used by pets are helpful for the health of cute pets. \nRed Fly

10003.description_en: A round head protective shield made of magical materials. Unlike other materials, it can breathe when worn.

10004.description_en: A pacifier that children can hold and play with, made of materials that will not harm children.

10005.description_en: Gorgeous wigs for those who like to look cool. The abrupt three-color wig is very eye-catching.

10006.description_en: The head decoration used by ancient queens has an indescribable authoritative design and is very gorgeous.

10007.description_en: The high-end bow made of soft silk is very comfortable to wear.

10008.description_en: The stick used in corporal punishment is a dangerous weapon.

10009.description_en: Wildflowers that bloom without anyone’s help.

10010.description_en: A pot that has become deformed after being used for too long. You can cook just using this, but it will also give you a strange feeling.

10012.description_en: Make eggshell hats in smaller sizes so that pets can wear them. .

10013.description_en: A backpack that can hold anything. It is mainly used to hold books, so it is called a school bag. \nPopoli

10014.description_en: Wearing glasses that look very cunning.

10015.description_en: A green bib for cute pets or children.

10016.description_en: A bell made of gold, the clear sound is very beautiful.

10017.description_en: Pants made of wood and bark. It won't cause sweating in hot areas and is very thin and light.

10018.description_en: A headband that matches perfectly with Yoyo Monkey.

10019.description_en: The red scarf is very red.

10020.description_en: It is said to be a sword used by spiritual Taoist priests who guide the dead. It is not suitable for use as a weapon. It is a sword specially used in soul-calling rituals.

11058.description_en: It's so easy, even green cottonworms can make it!\nIt's just like the instant meal recipe, just follow the instructions in the book. \n\\n\

11518.description_en: A beginner-specific mental power recovery agent made by grinding blue herbs to restore SP by about 5.

11547.description_en: Available only in PvP, villages, and WOE-FE theaters. \nThere is a lot of flavor between the red potion and the blue potion. The wild boar in the abandoned mine of Maleni...the wild boar feels very familiar with the potion. \nHP is restored to about 500, and SP is restored to about 60.

11548.description_en: Available only in PvP, villages, and WOE-FE theaters. \nOnly the tenderest leaves of organically grown white herbs can produce a refreshing flavored white potion. \nRecovers HP by about 10%.

11549.description_en: Available only in PvP, villages, and WOE-FE theaters. \nOnly the tenderest leaves of organic blue herbs can produce a refreshing flavored blue potion. \nRestores SP by about 10%.

11551.description_en: A fragrant cold salad that mixes various herbs with refreshing sauce. After eating it, you will magically gain strength. \nSTR+1 for 3 minutes. \nRecovers HP by approximately 25.

11552.description_en: The resonance of apples and carrots! The crisp salad makes people feel as happy as flying. \nAGI+1, lasts 3 minutes. \nRecovers HP by approximately 25.

11553.description_en: The maker can throw in various ingredients to cook the hot pot. \nVIT+1, lasts 3 minutes. \nRecovers HP by approximately 25.

11554.description_en: Whole apples baked. The flowing golden sheen will make your mouth water. \nDEX+1, lasts 3 minutes. \nRecovers HP by approximately 25.

11565.description_en: A physical recovery agent made from ground white herbs. HP can be restored to about 325.

11566.description_en: A physical recovery agent made from crushed yellow herbs. HP can be restored to approximately 175.

11567.description_en: A beginner-specific recovery agent specially made for beginners who have just started their adventure in the beginner training ground! Restores a small amount of HP.

11569.description_en: A physical recovery agent made from crushed red herbs. HP can be restored to approximately 105.

11570.description_en: The stamina restorer made by grinding red herbs restores approximately 45 HP.

11571.description_en: A healing agent made from ground green herbs to treat poisoning, silence, darkness, and chaos.

11572.description_en: A restorative made from ground blue herbs. SP can be restored to about 60.

11578.description_en: Candy in the shape of a cane can restore around 105 HP.

11580.description_en: Sweet and delicious candies can restore HP by about 45.

11614.description_en: Today, milked cows are often used as nutritional supplements for children's growth. Can restore a small amount of HP.

11615.description_en: The freshly dug purple root starch is sweet and abundant and is often used for food. Restores a small amount of HP.

11636.description_en: Lime juice is added to the cold soda to add a refreshing feeling. \nRecover 1800 HP.

11637.description_en: Add berry juice to the cold soda to add sweetness. \nRestore 180 SP.

12000.description_en: The paper contains a magician's spell made using ancient magic. Use level 5 water attribute magic freezing.

12001.description_en: Paper baptized by the High Priest. Use level 3 holy magic healing spell.

12002.description_en: Paper for baptism by the High Priest. Use level 5 holy magic healing spell.

12007.description_en: Arrow tube containing 500 metal arrows of the gods

12010.description_en: Arrow tube containing 500 wind spirit arrows

12011.description_en: Arrow tube containing 500 earth spirit arrows

12012.description_en: Arrow tube containing 500 water spirit arrows

12020.description_en: Cursed water, surrounded by a deep purple aura.

12021.description_en: The fat and red meat seem to be stacked into three layers of pork, which is very delicious~

12022.description_en: The ribs will taste better when grilled with pure charcoal~

12027.description_en: There is a 30% chance of being cursed within 30 seconds. Restores approximately 9% of HP.

12028.description_en: There is a 100% chance of increasing movement speed within 20 seconds.

12030.description_en: Increases attack power by approximately 20 within 60 seconds.

12032.description_en: Gives the weapon water properties for 20 minutes.

12034.description_en: There is a 30% chance of falling into silence within 30 seconds. Restores approximately 9% of SP.

12040.description_en: Hidden is a fantasy stone that can convert non-metals into gold and other mysterious powers. Red looks warm and soft.

12041.description_en: A dish that even beginners can cook easily. It's like feeling the smell of green grass. \nSTR+1, lasts 20 minutes.

12042.description_en: You may feel a little disgusted, but eating it will open your eyes to a new world. \nSTR+2, lasts 20 minutes.

12043.description_en: It looks like an ordinary steak, but when you eat it, it is a powerful and explosive dish. \nSTR+3, lasts 20 minutes.

12044.description_en: The sauced ribs are made by adding herbs to the cooking tips taught by Fei Yang to enhance the aroma. \nSTR+4, lasts 20 minutes.

12045.description_en: You can feel the sweet pancakes made by the lady of Gingerbread City. It's an uplifting smell. \nSTR+5, lasts 20 minutes.

12046.description_en: The herbal aroma in grape juice can wake up the brain, making it a very fragrant tea. Also much like regular grape juice. \nINT+1, lasts 20 minutes.

12047.description_en: A tea that combines the aromas of 3 kinds of herbs to become super fragrant. But it doesn't taste very good. \nINT+2, lasts 20 minutes.

12048.description_en: Add honey that can relieve fatigue to herbal tea and it becomes a very sweet tea. Very hot, drink with caution. \nINT+3, lasts 20 minutes.

12049.description_en: The wine made from sour fruits developed by a businessman from Monroc has a taste that women will not be burdened with. \nINT+4, lasts 20 minutes.

12050.description_en: Mastella is the wine that optimizes the refreshing effect. It is forbidden to drink too much. \nINT+5, lasts 20 minutes.

12051.description_en: A simple dish steamed with herbs and crab claws. The key is to carefully break down the shell before eating it. \nVIT+1, lasts 20 minutes.

12052.description_en: Hai presents dishes rich in nostalgia to the people in his hometown. I also shed tears when I heard about it. \nVIT+2, lasts 20 minutes.

12053.description_en: A delicious dish that preserves seafood. Boiling water and clam meat are both available. \nVIT+3, lasts 20 minutes.

12054.description_en: Slightly cooked tentacles are paired with squid ink and herbs that are good for you. It looks delicious, but the flavor is actually very subtle. \nVIT+4, lasts 20 minutes.

12055.description_en: Add slightly spicy sauce to the cooked buns and fry them to become a mouth-watering dish. If you eat too much, you will be miserable the next day. \nVIT+5, lasts 20 minutes.

12056.description_en: Soup made from boiling frog eggs over low heat. It’s best to close your eyes and eat it in one sitting. \nAGI+1, lasts 20 minutes.

12057.description_en: Smooth noodles like those made by noodle makers are the key to the dish. It is very inconvenient to eat because it is too smooth. \nAGI+2, lasts 20 minutes.

12058.description_en: The smooth tentacles are combined with sweet sweet potatoes and fragrant cheese, and stewed into a brown cheese soup. It seems to taste different from what is generally considered a nutritious food for children. \nAGI+3, lasts 20 minutes.

12059.description_en: A perfect blend of ice and spicy flavors. The pumpkin ingredient is quite special. \nAGI+4, lasts 20 minutes.

12060.description_en: A nutritious food made by wrapping red bat wings, a mysterious ingredient, with Sinare flower leaves and boiling them in a hollowed-out pumpkin. Gives off a subtle scent. \nAGI+5, lasts 20 minutes.

12061.description_en: Special grape juice made by adding highly nutritious honey to grape juice. Sour, sweet and so delicious. \nDEX+1, lasts 20 minutes.

12062.description_en: The special chocolate mousse cake was also highly praised by the royal dessert manager "Charolle Euroleone". Presents a soft and sweet slightly bitter taste. \nDEX+2, lasts 20 minutes.

12063.description_en: A dessert made of various fruits cut into easy-to-eat sizes and put into syrup. The crunchy texture is the ultimate. \nDEX+3, lasts 20 minutes.

12064.description_en: A light sandwich made with minced meat and cream cheese on freshly toasted bread. Best for lunch. \nDEX+4, lasts 20 minutes.

12065.description_en: A salad made with healthy vegetables and a sweet vembala dressing. Prontela's latest LOHAS menu. \nDEX+5, lasts 20 minutes.

12066.description_en: Fry the monkey tail until browned, and use it as a light dish with basic seasonings. I heard it's a very popular dish to go with drinks. \nLUK+1, lasts 20 minutes.

12067.description_en: A mixed juice with a variety of fruit juices. If you get the proportions wrong, it's likely to taste different. \nLUK+2, lasts 20 minutes.

12068.description_en: A dish made of roasted sweet potatoes and drizzled with syrup. Crispy and sweet, it is a very popular snack. \nLUK+3, lasts 20 minutes.

12069.description_en: This fish dish is made from freshly caught fish and the mermaid's mouth, which is said to be beneficial to health for some reason, wrapped in fragrant leaves and then steamed. \nI heard that men like it more than women. \nLUK+4, lasts 20 minutes.

12070.description_en: The most delicious fried scorpion tail dish. Break the hard shell and remove the soft flesh to eat. It is slightly toxic and eating too much is not good for your health. \nLUK+5, lasts 20 minutes.

12071.description_en: Because the taste of Soushu Pork is so good, people who have eaten it added the three words "shining" to its name. \nSTR+6, lasts 20 minutes.

12072.description_en: A whole pig roasted with spicy sauce. The best dish for carnivores. \nSTR+7, lasts 20 minutes.

12073.description_en: Considered to be the top delicacies in Dragon City, the bear paw on the right is especially the most popular. \nSTR+8, lasts 20 minutes.

12074.description_en: The fresh and high-quality tendons are slightly roasted to fully reveal the delicious taste of the ingredients. \nSTR+9, lasts 20 minutes.

12075.description_en: In addition to the expensive ingredients, it is the highest quality cuisine that is soft and delicious. I heard that the food is from Dragon City. \nSTR+10, lasts 20 minutes.

12076.description_en: The wine made from mature grapes has a taste that is different from other red wines. It is said that the secret lies in the use of shiitake mushrooms. \nINT+6, lasts 20 minutes.

12077.description_en: Propolis and honey are added to herbal tea, which is a drink that is helpful for rejuvenating the spirit, but the smell is not very good. \nINT+7, lasts 20 minutes.

12078.name_en: Premium tea exclusively for the royal family
12078.description_en: The ambitious work of "Charolle Euroleone", the person in charge of royal desserts, it is said that the aroma of afternoon tea even spreads to areas outside the royal city. \nINT+8, lasts 20 minutes.

12079.description_en: The highest-end wine produced to commemorate Tristan 3RD’s ascension to the throne. It is said that the taste is the best after 12 years. \nINT+9, lasts 20 minutes.

12080.description_en: You can feel the strong taste of dragon's breath with just one sip. Anyone who has drunk it once will never forget this taste. \nINT+10, lasts 20 minutes.

12081.description_en: There is an unconfirmed saying that the more unpleasant the medicine is, the more effective it will be. \nVIT+6, lasts 20 minutes.

12082.name_en: Special delicacies from mountains and seas
12082.description_en: After eating this magical dish, majestic mountains and blue seas will appear in your mind, and you can't help but cry. \nVIT+7, lasts 20 minutes.

12083.description_en: In order not to be eaten in one bite, the wrapped leaf dish is deliberately made into a very large portion. You can feel the creator's thoughts. \nVIT+8, lasts 20 minutes.

12084.description_en: The main ingredient of the cuisine is "dragon" spicy cuisine. It is said that after eating it, you will feel like you have ascended to heaven. \nVIT+9, lasts 20 minutes.

12085.description_en: Although I don’t like the shape and smell a bit, if I eat this, I will have the mentality that I will never die. \nVIT+10, lasts 20 minutes.

12086.description_en: This soup is a perfect match between the spicy taste of chili pepper and the aroma of shrimp...Rather than put it that way, it is actually a spicy shrimp dish. \nAGI+6, lasts 20 minutes.

12087.description_en: This dish of steamed and grilled crocodile meat wrapped in vegetables is a dish recommended by Chief Wembala. There is a strange rumor that this dish is only served to distinguished guests and domestic animals. \nAGI+7, lasts 20 minutes.

12088.description_en: It is said to add "the taste of endurance" to very spicy curry. The key to the taste seems to be the pumpkin I once wore on my head...\nAGI+8, lasting 20 minutes.

12089.name_en: Special Buddha Jumping over the wall
12089.description_en: Dishes made by cooking various kinds of meat over low heat. The aroma fills the air after opening the lid. It is a specialty of Dragon City. \nAGI+9, lasts 20 minutes.

12090.description_en: This is the desert scorpion stew known as the four delicacies of the Socrat Desert. I heard that it is cooked using the heat of the sand. \nAGI+10, lasts 20 minutes.

12091.description_en: Cake made from Kunlun's specialty peaches has a refreshing aroma and taste. The peaches in this cake are so soft. \nDEX+6, lasts 20 minutes.

12092.description_en: The key is to make people feel that the soul is about to leave the body. It is said that your tongue will melt after eating it. \nDEX+7, lasts 20 minutes.

12093.description_en: A giant toast dish that contains three times more meat, fruit and cheese than regular toast. With the addition of rich ingredients, it is still unknown whether the taste will be great. \nDEX+8, lasts 20 minutes.

12094.description_en: It is said that people who drink this juice have a feeling of "going to heaven". It is said that the most important thing is the proportion of fruits. \nDEX+9, lasts 20 minutes.

12095.description_en: Even named after the legendary spring known as the source of all rivers, everyone marveled at this drink..\nDEX+10 for 20 minutes.

12096.description_en: It is said that if you eat it when it is the hottest, your luck will be very good. But...it seems to be just a rumor. \nLUK+6, lasts 20 minutes.

12097.description_en: A variety of meats skewered on tree branches and grilled. You can choose the material according to your preference, so it is very popular. \nLUK+7, lasts 20 minutes.

12098.description_en: The refreshing strawberry flavor and aroma make this the ultimate rice ball. Just like eating strawberries as a side dish for rice, this is a rare and valuable experience. \nLUK+8, lasts 20 minutes.

12099.description_en: A soda drink with a spicy taste that is loved by children. Although it smells vaguely of blood, it tastes good after all, so forget it. \nLUK+9, lasts 20 minutes.

12100.description_en: Feiyang’s specialty nine-tailed fox tail dish. It is known as a lucky dish on Rune Midgard. \nLUK+10, lasts 20 minutes.

12112.description_en: Monroc's famous product is a sweet and high-concentration alcoholic beverage made from ripening various fruits. I heard that it can be matured to the most delicious state in the desert climate.

12114.description_en: When using this item, the attribute of 'fire' will be given to the user's weapon for 20 minutes

12115.description_en: When using this item, the attribute of 'water' will be given to the user's weapon for 20 minutes

12116.description_en: When using this item, the attribute of 'earth' will be given to the user's weapon for 20 minutes

12117.description_en: When using this item, the attribute of 'wind' will be given to the user's weapon for 20 minutes

12118.description_en: A potion that increases resistance to the "fire" attribute. The damage caused by mutually exclusive attributes will be aggravated, please note.

12119.name_en: Double the treasure drop rate with sugar
12119.description_en: A potion that increases resistance to the "water" attribute. The damage caused by mutually exclusive attributes will be aggravated, please note.

12120.description_en: A potion that increases resistance to the "earth" attribute. The damage caused by mutually exclusive attributes will be aggravated, please note.

12121.description_en: A potion that increases resistance to the "wind" attribute. The damage caused by mutually exclusive attributes will be aggravated, please note.

12125.description_en: Collecting some simple cooking utensils used for outdoor cooking should be used when surviving outdoors.

12126.description_en: Collecting cooking utensils commonly used at home should be able to cook the taste of my mother.

12127.description_en: Collecting some high-end cooking utensils into a complete set, it seems that I can cook better food.

12183.description_en: A quiver containing 500 sacred arrows blessed by holy water.

12197.description_en: Seasoned cakes restore a small amount of HP and SP.

12210.description_en: Unable to trade with other accounts. \nChewy and sweet bubble gum. It makes people feel inexplicably that they must hand over everything to the person chewing this bubble gum. \nAfter eating it, the probability of monsters dropping treasure will increase by 100% within 30 minutes.

12215.description_en: A scroll that records how to use the 10th level scroll of Angel's Blessing. Can use Angel's Blessing level 10. \nAttention! -The effect will not activate when used during chanting.

12216.description_en: A scroll that records how to use a level 10 scroll of acceleration. Can use acceleration level 10. \nAttention! -The effect will not activate when used during chanting. \nAttention! - Because HP will be consumed by 15, the effect will not activate if the HP is not above 15, only the scroll will disappear, so please be careful.

12217.name_en: Sprinkle water to pray for level 5 scroll
12217.description_en: A scroll that records how to use the level 5 scroll of sprinkling water for blessing. You can use Sprinkling Water to Pray for Level 5. \nAttention! -The effect will not activate when used during chanting. \nAttention! -Without holy water, only the scroll will be damaged.

12221.description_en: A suspicious machine that looks like a trumpet. It is said that when you speak close to your mouth, it has the magical ability to transmit the sound to a distance. \nThe conversation content you enter can be broadcast to the server. \nNote - If no content is entered within 3 minutes after use, it will become invalid.

12323.description_en: Put a spell on a fly's wings and you can move it to any location on the map.

12324.description_en: Clip the butterfly's wings to cast a spell. Can be moved instantly to the storage location.

12325.description_en: A magnifying glass allows you to observe and identify items more carefully. You can use [Ctrl+right click] to identify unidentified items in the inventory.

12410.description_en: Pork belly that can strengthen strangers’ friendship. You can also eat it with your family.

12497.name_en: Treasure drop rate multiplier sugar [exclusive for event]
12497.description_en: Chewy and sweet bubble gum. It makes people feel inexplicably that they must hand over everything to the person chewing this bubble gum. \nThe treasure drop rate within 30 minutes is +100%.

12516.name_en: Small water of life [exclusive for event]
12516.description_en:
This item cannot be traded with other accounts. 
The sap extracted from the Heaven and Earth Tree in a small bottle is said to have good effects on wound recovery. 
Within 10 minutes after taking it, MHP will be restored by 5% every 5 seconds. 
The effect will not be triggered while in the state of Furious Gun. 
If the character becomes unable to fight, the item effect will also disappear.

12548.description_en: Certificate of approval to open a purchase-only store. The seal of the Merchant Guild looks like it was drawn on by hand. (1 use)

12622.description_en:
A mount suitable for various professional groups, a mysterious rein that can be ridden by any mount. 
_
Mount types will be distinguished according to each profession series, and will be changed to mounts of the appropriate series when inheriting or changing professions. 
Can't put it in the warehouse either!

12674.description_en: Transformed into a small, sturdy box painted black. You can get one of the materials for making god-level props.

When the Legian Hunting Armor, Legian Hunting Cloak, and Legian Hunting Boots are each refined to +9 or above, the attack speed will increase (delay after attack -5%).

Physical damage caused to players +25%. 
Ignores the player's physical defense by 10%
Every time it is refined by 1, the physical damage caused to the player will increase by 1%. 
When refined to +7 or above, an additional 5% of the player's physical defense will be ignored. 
When refined to +9 or above, the physical damage caused to the player will be further increased by 15%. 
When refined to +10 or above, there is a certain chance of ignoring the player's physical defense by an additional 10% for 7 seconds during normal physical attacks. This will be further increased by 1% based on the refinement of the weapon.

Only characters above level 85 can use it, and it can only be used by swordsman series/rogue/magician/wizard/businessman series/taekwondo/boxing saint/spiritualist/sharpshooter/rebel.

22544.description_en: A mysterious potion that has an awakening effect after being taken. After taking it, the attack speed will increase. Only characters above level 40 can use it. Servers/Priests/Bards/Dancers cannot use it.

22702.description_en: After use, the STR value is reduced by 1 and converted into basic points. \nIt cannot be used when STR is 1.

23012.description_en:
The sap is extracted from the Heaven and Earth Tree and put into small bottles. It is said to have a good effect on the regeneration of magic power. 
Within 10 minutes after taking it, MSP will be restored by 5% every 5 seconds. 
The effect will not be triggered while in the state of Furious Gun. 
If the character becomes unable to fight, the item effect will also disappear.

23543.description_en:
The blessing of the Heaven and Earth Tree that increases the experience value and item drop rate within 30 days. 
_
The character using this prop will receive the BUFF effect within 30 days. 
-Experience value +10%
-Item drop rate +10%
_
Contains 1 World Tree wand that can summon the World Tree manager to provide additional services.

23604.description_en: A top-notch course that combines all the dishes that are said to be good for the body. \nAll qualities +10, ATK/MATK +30 within 30 minutes.

23605.description_en:
A potion that activates the energy in the body and greatly enhances abilities. 
ATK/MATK+30, ATK/MATK+1%,
HIT/FLEE+30, ASPD+1, SP consumption -5%,
Fixed chanting -30% within 30 minutes. 
(The % increase or decrease effect of fixed chanting only applies the maximum effect.)

23608.description_en: A potion containing the blessing of the god of herbs. \nWithin 30 minutes, the healing effect received and the effect of using some recovery items are +20%.

23611.description_en: Water taken from the Fountain of Wisdom. \nIn 30 minutes, MSP +10%, SP consumption -10%. \n(When BUFFs with the same effect exist at the same time, only the last effect applied will be applied.)

23626.description_en: A thoughtful experimental work that has been studied for a long time by the Giffen Magic Association. \nYou can find the location of the searched open-air store by using the magic order of "Items for sale or purchase in open-air stores." \nOnly search for open-air shops that are open on the user's map.

23627.description_en: Further research results from the Giffen Magic Society! \nScrolls containing the magic "You can search for items sold and purchased in open-air shops" can directly buy or sell items through the searched links! \nOnly search for open-air shops that are open on the user's map.

23647.description_en: After shaking the bell, no matter where you are, the wandering merchant will appear to sell or buy goods. \nAs long as you have this, it’s okay not to go to the village!

23648.description_en: The bell in Capra's warehouse can be conveniently used. \nNo matter where it is, just shake it and Capra staff will open the warehouse.

23649.description_en: Suspicious box with Polly painted on it. \nIt looks like there are jelly pieces inside.

23657.description_en: Proof of purchasing life insurance, be sure to sign it before going into dangerous battles. \nWithin 30 minutes after use, the death penalty will be canceled when dying, and it will lose its effectiveness once it takes effect.

-The cat warehouse limit value is +300

32015.description_en:
"※WOE-FE War Zone Additional Attributes"
Physical damage to players +20%. 
Ignore 5% of the player's physical defense. 
Every time it is refined by 1, the physical damage to the player will be increased by 1%. 
When refined to +7 or above, ignore 5% of the player's defense. 
When refined to +9 or above, the physical damage to the player will be increased by 15%.
Refined to +10 or above, when the provocation is successful, the damage of the continuous stabbing attack will be +20% within 10 seconds. When using the continuous stabbing attack, there is a certain probability of causing coma and darkness to the enemy. The damage, coma, and darkness of the stabbing attack will be increased based on the proficiency level of the spear.

32016.description_en:
A spear that emits dusk light. 
Each refining +2, CRI +3. 
When refined to +7, the physical damage caused to normal enemies will be increased by 4%. 
When refined to +9, the physical damage caused to ordinary enemies will be increased by 8%.

32103.description_en:
"※WOE-FE War Zone Additional Attributes"
Physical damage to players +15%. 
Ignore 5% of the player's physical defense. 
Every time it is refined by 1, the physical damage to the player will be increased by 1%. 
When refined to +7 or above, ignore 5% of the player's defense. 
When refined to +9 or above, the physical damage to the player will be further increased by 15%. 
Refined to +10 or above, when using improvised skills, instrument attack damage +30%, HIT +20, and variable chant -30% within 60 seconds. 
Depending on the level of refinement, HIT and instrument attack damage will be increased.

32200.description_en:

Can be refined. 
Variable chant -2%, MATK +2. 
When refined to +7 or above, MATK will be +2
When refined to +9 or above, the variable chanting bonus will be -1%, and the fire attribute magic damage will be +1%.

200267.description_en:
There are 10 chests containing highly concentrated God Metal. 
_
A slender ore that can protect the safety of precious equipment. 
- When refining a weapon with a refinement level of +7 or above, the weapon will not be damaged or disappear even if it fails, and the existing refining will be reduced by -1. This ore cannot be used for refining above +10. -
(When refining fails, the refining degree is reduced by 1.)

200268.description_en:
There are 10 boxes of highly concentrated aluminum. 
_
A slender ore that can protect the safety of precious equipment. 
-When refining armor with a refinement level of +7 or above, the weapon will not be damaged or disappear even if it fails! However, it will not be refined above +10. -
(When refining fails, the refining degree is reduced by 1.)

200271.description_en:
There is a box with a gym membership ticket to increase the weight. 
_
If you transfer this membership ticket to a specific NPC, the NPC will teach you special skills to increase the weight you can carry. 
Each skill level increases the weight by 200 and can be learned to level 10.

200280.description_en:
[Period of use] Within 3 days after the item is used
[Effect target] The character who uses the item
Experience value & item drop rate +10% within 3 days. 
Three times a day, provide overall recovery and BUFF. 
In addition, 2 world map movement tickets will be provided for free once it is turned on. 
_
A must-have gift pack useful to everyone! 
Provide 3 World Tree Dews every day that can restore overall HP/SP and use buffs. 
[Blessing of the Heaven and Earth Tree]
All State+7 within 1 hour,
ATK+30, MATK+30, HIT+5, FLEE+5.

The Key to the Hidden World is a character-binding prop. 
※When you hold this item and talk to the NPC Mysterious Guide, the option to move to the PVP map will be activated. 
※The Key to the Hidden World is a usable prop and needs to be used in the PVP map. After use, you will get exclusive BUFF. 
※Exclusive BUFF: Gain experience points, prop drop rate +15%, lasts for 12 hours, and expires when leaving the PVP map.

1000375.description_en: A stone that increases long-distance physical damage. \nGive the following ability values ​​on the head slot of the costume. \nLong distance physical damage +1%.

1000376.description_en:
A stone that increases long-distance physical damage. 
Give the following ability values ​​on the slot under the clothing head. 
Long distance physical damage +1%. 
When combined with the Wide Stone (on the head) and the Wide Stone (in the middle of the head), long-distance physical damage will be increased by 2%.

1000377.description_en: A stone that increases physical damage at close range. \nGive the following ability values ​​on the head slot of the costume. \nClose physical damage +1%.

Give the following ability values ​​on the slot under the clothing head. 
Close physical damage +1%. 
When combined with melee stone (on the head) and melee stone (in the head), the physical damage at close range is increased by another 2%.

All attribute magic damage +1%. 
When combined with magic attribute stone (on the head), magic attribute stone (in the head), and magic attribute stone (under the head), all attribute magic damage will be increased by 2%.

1000551.description_en: Ore needed to make dazzling armor.

1000562.description_en: A restorative that instantly heals all wounds upon consumption. \nAs long as you don't die, you can recover from any wound.

1000646.description_en: One of the books Lucian said he was looking for.

1000649.description_en: The box containing the necklace that Saleh Hamid decided to deliver to the head of the Sahario investigation team.

1000650.description_en: A sealed letter from the suspicious girl "D". The seal sealing the envelope was stamped with the word D. \n[Recipient: Grand Elder of the Cross Assassin Guild]

1000651.description_en: Catherine E., Princess of the Rune Midgard Kingdom. A sealed letter from Cavalcade. The envelope was sealed with the word "D" printed on it to conceal the true identity of the sender. \n[Recipient: Grand Elder of the Cross Assassin Guild]

1000652.description_en: "A sealed letter from the Grand Elder of the Cross Assassin Guild. \nThe seal of the sealed envelope is printed with the Cross Assassin Guild logo. \n[Recipient: D"

1000653.description_en: Painted with contaminated shell meat. Although it can be eaten in various ways, if the dirt left by living on the mudflats is not removed, you will feel bad when eating it.

1000654.description_en: Cut off contaminated crab claws. \nCrab claws are harder than expected, and they will never let go once they are caught, so be careful.

1000655.description_en: Cell tissues collected to study beer penguins.

1000656.description_en: Cell tissue collected from baby seals to study.

1000658.description_en: Cell tissue collected to study sea otters.

1000659.description_en: Burnt letters found in food stores selling food made with contaminated ingredients.

1000660.description_en: Herbs are the ingredients of the plague treatment on Demonic Island.

1000661.description_en: A potion used to cure the Plague of Demon Island that has spread on the seaside city of Demon Island. \nThe best healing agent made by Prontela, the priest sent by Prontela Church.

1000662.description_en: Damaged letters recently found in Sandleman. \nThe seal that originally sealed the letter was damaged, making it impossible to know who the sender was.

1001205.description_en: A slender ore that keeps valuable equipment safe. \n-When refining a weapon with a refinement level of +7 or above, the weapon will not be damaged or disappear even if it fails! However, it will not be refined above +10. -\n(When refining fails, the refining degree is reduced by 1.)

1001206.description_en: A fine ore that can protect the safety of precious equipment. \n-When refining armor with a refinement level of +7 or above, the weapon will not be damaged or disappear even if it fails! However, it will not be refined above +10. -\n(When refining fails, the refining degree is reduced by 1.)

1001207.description_en: Gym membership coupons that can increase the amount of possessions. \nWhen you transfer this membership ticket to a specific NPC, the NPC will teach you special skills to increase the weight you can carry. \nEach skill level increases the weight by 200 and can be learned to level 10.

1001209.description_en: After years of compression, the density and strength have become higher, and the difficulty of refining the armor seems to have increased. \n- If it is an armor with a refinement level of +10 or above, even if it fails and the armor is damaged, it will not disappear! -\n(When refining fails, the refining degree of the equipment decreases by 1.)

1001210.description_en: After continuous research by scholars in Midgard, the density and strength are higher, and the difficulty of refining the weapon seems to have also increased. \n- If the weapon is refined +10 or above, even if the weapon is damaged due to failure, it will not disappear! -\n(When refining fails, the refining degree of the equipment will be reduced by 1.)

1100001.name_en: Large Capacity City War Purple Potion
1100001.description_en:
Available only in PvP, villages, and WOE-FE theaters. 
There is a lot of flavor between the red potion and the blue potion. The wild boar in the abandoned mine of Maleni...the wild boar feels very familiar with the potion. 
Proud of having 50% more capacity than the original capacity. 
HP is restored to about 750, and SP is restored to about 100.

1100048.description_en: After drinking it, you will feel the spring passing away alone, and the light seems to accompany you gently as you move forward. \nHP is restored by 10%, SP is restored by 10%. \nCooling time is 2 seconds.

1100049.description_en: The supplies seem to be entangled with some kind of power and can restore half of HP and SP. \nCooling time is 3 seconds.

1270187.description_en: This hair accessory is said to bring good luck just by wearing it.
